description: Seize the day on a healthy note with the Labanita Skimmed Milk. It contains a host of healthy nutrients that help in strengthening your muscles and bones. description: Enjoy the thick and creamy texture of the Bekhero Full Cream Milk. An excellent source of calcium and protein, it helps in strengthening your bones and muscles. Its thick texture helps to prepare thick, creamy and delicious curds. The full-cream milk makes for an excellent addition to balanced and healthy diets.

name: Juhayna Cooking Cream
description: Add a velvety texture and finish to every gravy or sauce with the Juhayna Cooking Cream. It features a thick texture that helps add volume and body to various foods and desserts. The cream's soothing taste helps normalize spicy flavors. It ranks high in nutrients and vitamins to give your optimal nourishment.

name: Juhayna Whipping Cream
description: Garnish your confectionaries by topping it with the Juhayna Whipping Cream in different patterns. Its thick, creamy texture adds a luxurious tone to the freshly baked products. The cream is enriched in all the major energy components, including proteins, carbohydrates and fats for keeping the body healthy. name: Labanita Milk Full Cream
description: Satisfy your sudden hunger pangs with the Labanita Full Cream Milk. The milk is ideal for making a variety of dishes and you can also consume it directly. It is a rich source of calcium, vitamins D, A, B1, phosphorous and riboflavin that balances our nutrition quotient. With the airtight and handy design, the milk is easy and convenient to carry.

name: Almarai Whipping Cream
description: Add richness to a wide variety of cuisines with the Almarai Whipping Cream. You can use it for baked goods like cakes, pastries and pies. This whipping cream can also be used to enhance the flavor of the soup or make homemade butter. It's versatile for mixing with chocolate and many other ingredients like coffee, sauce and frostings.

name: Almarai Cooking Cream
description: Provide a creamy touch to your favorite delicacy with the Almarai Cooking Cream. It can be used to give consistency to the gravies and curries. You can use this cooking cream for preparing a variety of dishes like soups, casseroles and sauces. This cooking cream is a rich source of vitamin D3 that helps in having healthy bones.

name: Rich Bake Bread Crumbs
description: The Rich Bake Bread Crumbs holds all your stuff together to help you get that perfect crunchy snack. These breadcrumbs can be used for stuffing the poultry, thickening the sews, topping the casseroles and much more. The Rich Bake breadcrumbs help you get that perfect crunchiness in your fried and baked foods.

The distinctive taste of this Rich Bake milk toast is sure to suit people with different palates. It is also a good source of calcium and minerals that are essential to maintain a healthy lifestyle.
